query:
_index=sec_record*
| where !(srcDevice_ip_countryCode = "US") and !isEmpty(srcDevice_ip_countryCode) and !(metadata_vendor="Bro")
| count by srcDevice_ip, srcDevice_ip_countryCode, metadata_vendor, metadata_product, metadata_deviceEventId
| order by _count

sources.dashboardName: Cloud SIEM - Record Analysis - Record Overview
sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides an overview of CSE Records by source, destination, volume and breakdown vendor and product.
